description: Rise of Avalon Patch 9 - Hotfix 1 (26 November 2020) — Fixes.

sections.heading: Fixes

items.text: Damage from the Spectre Jacket spell: Self Ignition no longer stacks from multiple players. However when multiple players use the spell within overlapping damage areas, no damage is dealt. This is a known issue and will be resolved with in an upcoming patch.

sections.searchable_text: Fixes Damage from the Spectre Jacket spell: Self Ignition no longer stacks from multiple players. However when multiple players use the spell within overlapping damage areas, no damage is dealt. This is a known issue and will be resolved with in an upcoming patch.
